entity_evidence.text: The Department of Finance shall establish interpretations necessary to carry out the provisions of this section and shall furnish the same to the Controller and to every state agency to which appropriations are made under this act.

entity: State of California Governor's Budget for 2025-26

entity_evidence.text: For the purpose of further interpreting the meaning of the words, terms and phrases, and uniform codes used in the schedules, reference is hereby made to those documents entitled, "State of California Governor's Budget for 2025-26" submitted by the Governor to the Legislature at the 2025 portion of the 2025-26 Regular Session,
